title: Mellow Middle Eastern Tofu Stew
description: A creamy, umami-packed stew that balances robust spices with a gentle soda water base, perfect for meal‑prep and low FODMAP dining.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add cumin and smoked paprika, sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add carrots and zucchini, cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in cherry tomatoes and continue cooking for 2 minutes.
Pour in vegetable broth and soda water, bring to a gentle simmer.
Toss in tofu cubes and let the stew simmer for 10 minutes, allowing the tofu to absorb flavors.
Add coconut milk and spinach, simmer until spinach wilts, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt to taste and drizzle lemon juice if desired.
Remove from heat, let the stew rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot, or refrigerate for meal prep.
